macro_events.event_summary: Kevin Warsh's upcoming Fed Chair confirmation hearing is the next major catalyst for US Treasuries, with markets watching for signals on monetary policy direction.
primary_drivers: Uncertainty over future Fed policy stance under new leadership
Warsh's known hawkish reputation could steepen curve / lift long-end yields
Repricing of rate path expectations ahead of testimony

beneficiaries.rationale: Charles Schwab benefits from higher/steeper yields via net interest margin expansion on cash sweeps; a hawkish Warsh signal lifts front-end yields and reduces cash-sorting pressure.

headlines: Warsh’s Fed Confirmation Hearing Is Next Driver for US Debt

macro_events.event_summary: Analyst piece arguing the petrodollar system faces structural threats as China pushes yuan-denominated oil settlement — a thematic/narrative article rather than a concrete policy event.
primary_drivers: Gold and alternative reserve asset demand

beneficiaries.rationale: Largest US-listed gold miner; leveraged beta to gold price moves driven by reserve-diversification narratives. Operating leverage means ~1% gold move → 2-3% equity move.
Uranium/hard-asset thesis rides alongside gold on de-dollarization narratives; Cameco is the liquid Western pure-play and tends to trade with commodity reserve-asset flows on thematic days.

headlines: Petrodollar System Faces 3 Threats as Yuan Challenges Dollar
